SEARCH
Package com.ju57a7ouc4n.phishlab.model.entities

Class AnalysisResult

java.lang.Object
com.ju57a7ouc4n.phishlab.model.entities.AnalysisResult
public class AnalysisResult extends Object
Dynamic container for the investigation state. Accompanies the URL through all phases of the analysis pipeline (Local, OSINT, Active), accumulating evidence, HTTP headers, and calculating the final threat score.
Version:
1.0
Author:
ju57a7ouc4n

  • Constructor Details

    • AnalysisResult

      public AnalysisResult(UrlTarget target)
      Initializes a new analysis report linked to a specific target. Prepares internal data collections and sets default values prior to the execution of the intelligence gathering phases.
      Parameters:
      target - The validated object containing the URL to investigate.

  • Method Details

    • addHeader

      public void addHeader(String key, String value)
      Inserts or updates an HTTP header in the server response evidence map.
      Parameters:
      key - The name of the header (e.g., "Server", "X-Frame-Options").
      value - The value returned by the server for that header.

    • addThreatScore

      public void addThreatScore(int points, String reason)
      Increments the total risk score of the target and logs the justification. Implements a logical constraint to ensure the final score never exceeds the maximum limit of 100 points.
      Parameters:
      points - Amount of risk points to add based on the severity of the finding.
      reason - Detailed description of the detected anomaly justifying the score.
